_about: Ground truth for the synthetic Lakeside/Parkview cases. Because we authored the evidence, these are the leads a correct ACPIA run must surface. Used by evals/run.py.

lakeside.date_trap: 'this saturday' is relative -> must be inferred/verify, never stated as an established date

cross_case_expected_exact.phone: +1-555-0148 == +1 (555) 0148 (same number, different formatting; normalization must link them)
